claims.claim: High-entropy continuity recap needs dynamic bounded room so the subject of a distributed cascade is not clipped into mere vibration.
claims.evidence_plan: Link entropy-scaled recap budget tests and source.

claims.claim: Mirror mode above the high-texture entropy gate should preserve semantic-energy anchors through bounded recap.

claims.claim: Simply raising the high-texture entropy gate to 0.95 would be a blunt live prompt-surface change; the safer answer is gradual budget scaling and anchor preservation.
claims.evidence_plan: Link soft-gate and density-moderated recap tests.
